subject: [PATCH v2 2/5] ansible: replace deprecated top-level ansible_* facts with ansible_facts[]

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch replaces deprecated top-level Ansible facts (e.g. ansible_os_family) with the new form using the ansible_facts dictionary, as required by Ansible-core 2.24. The change affects 109 playbook and template files across various roles in the tree.
